_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
source_files: PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Cataract/Cataract Surgery (Phaco and SICS)_Medco.pdf
PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Cataract/Cataract Surgery (Phaco and SICS)_PPD.CPD.pdf
clinical_indications: BCVA <= 6/9 not improving with pinhole or glasses

preauth.label: Clinical photo of affected eye, labelled R/L

claim.label: Still image of patient undergoing the procedure with patient ID + date
Operative notes detailing surgical steps + implant details

ppd_preauth.q: Previous cataract surgery in the same eye?

cpd_claim.q: OT notes detail surgical steps + IOL barcode / implant details + surgery success?
Post-op care and follow-up advice documented (day 1, 1-2 wks, 2-4 wks)?

common_queries: BCVA not documented, or documented above the 6/9 threshold without justification
Affected eye not labelled R or L in the clinical photograph
Missing IOL barcode at claim stage
Ocular biometry (A-scan/keratometry) not attached at pre-auth
